title: Room for a Fantasy
artist: nostraightanswer ft. Hatsune Miku V4X English

lines.ja: VOCAL:Hatsune Miku V4 (English)
lines.en: VOCAL:Hatsune Miku V4 (English)

lines.ja: Tell me what I see
lines.en: Tell me what I see

lines.ja: Paint a vivid scene
lines.en: Paint a vivid scene

lines.ja: Taste and feel, no disbelief
lines.en: Taste and feel, no disbelief

lines.ja: Balancing your dreams
lines.en: Balancing your dreams

lines.ja: And your favorite themes
lines.en: And your favorite themes

lines.ja: With the real world underneath
lines.en: With the real world underneath

lines.ja: You know, I know it hurts sometimes
lines.en: You know, I know it hurts sometimes

lines.ja: Stretched to the limit of our daily lives
lines.en: Stretched to the limit of our daily lives

lines.ja: To just set aside a few hours of our time, time, time
lines.en: To just set aside a few hours of our time, time, time

lines.ja: But just before we say good night
lines.en: But just before we say good night

lines.ja: I'll capture the essence of things we like

lines.en: And weave 'em all together, make a piece of paradise

lines.ja: Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy
lines.en: Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy

lines.ja: I wonder if you slept right next to me

lines.en: No nightmares, just how things ought to be

lines.en: Never wished for anything

lines.en: But I'd take every chance you'd give to me

lines.en: To stay by your side, through darkness and light
